Yes, I will be doing a Conversation with him. He has a [recent book out on the history of sexuality and Christianity](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b322f7cf7a9410b9406ca292bb521cdc4fc559d84466dde79b70a49dfbd15fa3&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91695&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=dbded28cc48e231ebe83f2a3093970d8&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=295d0d2635bb95d3ee5958cd1173cfb4), but of course is renowned for[ a much longer series of books and writings](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=47745d05ee4f44505b9eec34ca08ed39d7d90f7619bc08307d2771c3812c3015&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91695&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=2bdac3b91982d497bd3e37754edd1e08&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1hem9uLmNvbS9zP2s9ZGlhcm1haWQrbWFjY3VsbG9jaCZjcmlkPTFSQThHTjhFTks2NlAmc3ByZWZpeD1kaWFybWFpZCUyQ2FwcyUyQzM4MCZyZWY9bmJfc2Jfc3NfcDEzbi1leHBlcnQtcGQtb3BzLXJhbmtlcl8xXzg&email_id=295d0d2635bb95d3ee5958cd1173cfb4) on Christianity, the Reformation, and Tudor British history, just for a start.
Here is [his Wikipedia page](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=100870ee40a53e3776811a46e5efce9b0aec08c80194c545625db2d189106d7c&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91695&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=c8d24cf45e8697de26ec4c1063c4a406&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbi53aWtpcGVkaWEub3JnL3dpa2kvRGlhcm1haWRfTWFjQ3VsbG9jaA=&email_id=295d0d2635bb95d3ee5958cd1173cfb4). So what should I ask him?
